html.nextop-chat-mobile-widget-expanded,
body.nextop-chat-mobile-widget-expanded {
	overflow: hidden !important;
	height: 100% !important;
	width: 100% !important;
	position: fixed !important;
	margin: 0 !important;
	top: 0 !important;
	left: 0 !important;
}

.nextop-chat {
	visibility: hidden;
	opacity: 0;
	position: fixed;
	max-height: calc(100% - 40px);
	max-width: calc(100% - 40px);
	-webkit-transition: 0.2s linear;
	transition: 0.2s linear;
	-webkit-transition-property: visibility, opacity;
	transition-property: visibility, opacity;
	-webkit-backface-visibility: hidden;
	backface-visibility: hidden;
	width: auto;
	height: auto;
	min-height: 0;
	min-width: 0;
	display: block;
	-webkit-box-sizing: content-box;
	box-sizing: content-box;
	padding: 0;
	margin: 0;
}

@media print {
	.nextop-chat {
		display: none;
	}
}

.nextop-chat__iframe-wrapper,
.nextop-chat__iframe {
	left: 0 !important;
	top: 0 !important;
	height: 100% !important;
	width: 100% !important;
	min-width: 100% !important;
	max-width: 100% !important;
	min-height: 100% !important;
	max-height: 100% !important;
	margin: 0 !important;
	padding: 0 !important;
	display: block !important;
	background: transparent !important;
	opacity: 1;
	-webkit-transform: none;
	transform: none;
}

.nextop-chat__iframe-wrapper {
	position: absolute;
	-webkit-box-shadow:
		0 0 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1),
		0 0 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
	box-shadow:
		0 0 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1),
		0 0 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
	overflow: hidden !important;
}

.nextop-chat__iframe-wrapper,
.nextop-chat--safari .nextop-chat__iframe,
.nextop-chat--webkit.nextop-chat--expanded .nextop-chat__iframe {
	border-radius: 12px;
}

.nextop-chat--mobile-widget:not(.nextop-chat--expanded),
.nextop-chat--mobile-widget:not(.nextop-chat--expanded) * {
	cursor: pointer;
}

.nextop-chat--safari .nextop-chat__iframe {
	-webkit-mask-image: -webkit-gradient(linear, left top, left bottom, from(#000), to(#000));
	-webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(#000, #000);
	mask-image: -webkit-gradient(linear, left top, left bottom, from(#000), to(#000));
	mask-image: linear-gradient(#000, #000);
	-webkit-mask-position: 50% 50%;
	mask-position: 50% 50%;
	-webkit-mask-size: 100% 100%;
	mask-size: 100% 100%;
	-webkit-mask-repeat: no-repeat;
	mask-repeat: no-repeat;
}

.nextop-chat:not(.nextop-chat--expanded) .nextop-chat__iframe-wrapper {
	-webkit-transition: 0.2s linear;
	transition: 0.2s linear;
	-webkit-transition-property: -webkit-box-shadow;
	transition-property: -webkit-box-shadow;
	transition-property: box-shadow;
	transition-property:
		box-shadow,
		-webkit-box-shadow;
}

.nextop-chat:not(.nextop-chat--expanded):hover .nextop-chat__iframe-wrapper {
	-webkit-box-shadow:
		0 0 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1),
		0 0 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
	box-shadow:
		0 0 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1),
		0 0 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
}

.nextop-chat--visible {
	visibility: visible;
	opacity: 1;
}

.nextop-chat--animating {
	-webkit-transition: 350ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0, 1);
	transition: 350ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0, 1);
	-webkit-transition-property:
		height,
		width,
		max-width,
		max-height,
		top,
		bottom,
		left,
		right,
		-webkit-transform;
	transition-property:
		height,
		width,
		max-width,
		max-height,
		top,
		bottom,
		left,

    background: var(--xcotton-pp-color-bg);
    text-align: left;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-header-title {
    font-weight: 700;
    font-style: Bold;
    font-size: 14px;
    letter-spacing: 0%;
    line-height: 1.2;
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-title);
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-header-subtitle {
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-subTitle);
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1.2;
    margin-top: 6px;
    letter-spacing: 0%;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-header-title *,
  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-header-subtitle * {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-header-title p span {
    vertical-align: middle;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-header-subtitle p span {
    vertical-align: middle;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-header-box {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-tip {
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1.2;
    text-decoration: underline;
    text-decoration-style: solid;
    cursor: pointer;
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-title);
    letter-spacing: 0%;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-content {
    margin-top: 12px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 6px;
    text-align: left;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-content-item {
    box-sizing: border-box;
    cursor: pointer;
    border-radius: 6px;
    border-width: 1px;
    padding: 6px;
    border: 1px solid var(--xcotton-pp-color-option-border);
    background: var(--xcotton-pp-color-option);
    position: relative;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-content-item-year {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1;
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-year);
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-content-item-money-wrapper {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1;
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-price);
    padding: 8px 0;
  }

  
  .xcotton-productProtection__originalPrice {
    margin-left: 10px;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 12px;
    text-decoration: line-through;
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-original-price);
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection__getIt-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.2;
    border-radius: 6px;
    border: 1px solid var(--xcotton-pp-color-option-ext-border);
    letter-spacing: 0px;
    padding: 5px 0;
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-option-ext);
    background: var(--xcotton-pp-color-option-ext-bg);
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection__getIt-text,.xcotton-productProtection__getIt-text-active {
    margin-left: 6px;
  }
  
  .xcotton-productProtection__getIt-text-active,
  .xcotton-productProtection__getIt-halloweenSubtract {
    display: none;
  }

  .xcotton-xcotton-frame {
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-option-ext);
    font-size: 12px;
  }
  
  .xcotton-xcotton-subtract2 {
    color: #fff;
    display: none;
    font-size: 12px;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-halloween-bg {
    display: none;
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    right: 0;
    transform: scale(0.4);
    width: auto !important;
    height: auto !important;
    transform-origin: top right;
    border-top-right-radius: 6px;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-warp .xcotton-hot {
    transform: scale(1);
    font-size: 26px;
    line-height: 16px;
    top: 6px;
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-theme);
  }

  .xcotton-pp-activity .xcotton-productProtection__currentPrice {
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-theme);
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked.xcotton-pp-activity .xcotton-productProtection__currentPrice {
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-checked-price);
  }

  .xcotton-pp-activity .xcotton-productProtection-halloween-bg {
    display: inline;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-warp .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-hot {
    color: #fff;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-productProtection__currentPrice {
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-checked-price);
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-productProtection__originalPrice {
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-original-checked-price);
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-productProtection-detail-content-item-year {
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-checked-year);
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-productProtection__getIt-text {
    display: none;
  }
  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-xcotton-frame {
    display: none;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-productProtection__getIt-text-active {
    display: inline-block;
  }
  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-xcotton-subtract2 {
    display: inline;
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-checked-option);
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-productProtection__getIt-wrapper {
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-checked-option);
    border: 1px solid #fff;
    background: #fff;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-xcotton-frame {
    color: var(--xcotton-pp-color-theme);
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked {
    border: 1px solid var(--xcotton-pp-color-checked-option-border);
    background: var(--xcotton-pp-color-checked-option);
  }
  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-checked .xcotton-productProtection-detail-content-item-label-icon {
    display: inline-block;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-warp .xcotton-content-text-img {
    margin: 0 3px !important;
    height: 18px !important;
    width: auto !important;
    vertical-align: middle !important;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-warp .xcotton-content-text-img:nth-child(1) {
    margin-left: 0 !important;
    margin-top: 0px!important;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-header-title .xcotton-content-text-img {
    height: 20px !important;
  }

  .xcotton-productProtection-detail-header-subtitle .xcotton-content-text-img {
    height: 16px !important;
    display: inline !important;
  }

  @media screen and (max-width: 1200px) {
    .xcotton-productProtection-detail-header-title {
      font-size: 12px;
    }

    .xcotton-productProtection-tip {
      font-size: 10px;
    }
    
    .xcotton-productProtection-detail-content-item-year {
      font-size: 12px;
    }

    .xcotton-productProtection__currentPrice {
      font-size: 12px;
    }

    .xcotton-productProtection__originalPrice {
      font-size: 10px;
    }

    .xcotton-productProtection__getIt-halloweenAdd,
    .xcotton-productProtection__getIt-halloweenSubtract {
      width: 12px;
      height: 12px;
      margin-right: 4px;
    }

    .xcotton-productProtection__getIt-wrapper {
      font-size: 10px;
      padding: 2px 0;
    }
  }

      -moz-osx-font-smoothing: auto;

        connectedCallback() {
            const globalBtn = this.shadowRoot.querySelector('.watt-global-menu__main');
            const menuBox = this.shadowRoot.querySelector('.watt-global-menu');
            if (globalBtn && menuBox) {

                globalBtn.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
                    event.stopPropagation(); 
                    menuBox.classList.toggle('active');
                });

                document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
                    const insideMenu = menuBox.contains(event.target);
                    const insideBtn = globalBtn.contains(event.target);

                    if (!insideMenu && !insideBtn) {
                        menuBox.classList.remove('active');
                    }
                });
            }
        }
    }

<script defer="">
class WattProductPageCollapsibleMsg extends HTMLElement {
  constructor() {
    super();
    this.attachShadow({ mode: 'open' });
    this.viewMoreText = "View More";
    this.viewLessText = "View Less";
    this.marginTop = 10;
    this.marginBottom = 10;
    this.titleFontSize = 22;
    this.titleFontColor = "#f64d09";
    this.titleFontMarginBottom = 10;
    this.defaultCollapsibleHeight = 190;
    this.boxBgColor = "#f5f5f5";
    this.contentFontColor = "#111111";
    this.contentLinkColor = "#111111";
    
    this.shadowRoot.innerHTML = `
        <style>
            span.collapsible-title {
              display: inline-block;
              font-size: ${this.titleFontSize}px;
              margin-bottom: ${this.titleFontMarginBottom}px;
              font-weight: 700;
              color: ${this.titleFontColor};
            }
            #product-info {
                max-width: 800px;
                padding: 5px 10px 15px;
                margin: 10px auto 0;
                border-radius: 10px;
                background-color: ${this.boxBgColor};
            }
            #product-content {
                position: relative;
                padding: 16px 16px 0;
                border-radius: 8px;
                overflow: hidden;
                color: ${this.contentFontColor};
                max-height: ${this.defaultCollapsibleHeight}px;
                transition: max-height 0.4s ease;
            }
            #product-content a {
                color: ${this.contentLinkColor};
            }
            #product-content ul {
              padding-left: 1.05em!important;
              padding-inline-start: 1.05em!important;
              margin: 0!important;
            }
            #product-content ul li {
              padding-bottom: 10px;
            }
            #product-content ul li:last-child {
              padding-bottom: 0;
            }
            #product-content.expanded {
                max-height: 2000px;
                scrollbar-width: none;
                -ms-overflow-style: none;
                overflow-y: auto;
            }
            #product-content.expanded::-webkit-scrollbar {
              display: none; 
            }
            #product-content::after {
                position: absolute;
                content: "";
                bottom: 0;
                left: 0;
                right: 0;
                height: 60px;
                background: linear-gradient(to top, ${this.boxBgColor}, rgba(237,237,237,0));
                pointer-events: none;
                transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
            }
            #product-content.expanded::after,
            #product-content.less-limit-height::after {
                opacity: 0;
            }
            #product-content.less-limit-height {
              padding-bottom: 15px;
            }
            #view {
                display: inline-flex;
                margin: 10px 0 0 10px;
                font-size: 14px;
                font-weight: 600;
                color: ${this.titleFontColor};
                cursor: pointer;
                align-items: center;
                user-select: none;
            }
            #view .arrow {
                display: inline-block;
                width: 6px;
                height: 6px;
                margin: -2px 0 0 6px;
                border-left: 2px solid ${this.titleFontColor};
                border-bottom: 2px solid ${this.titleFontColor};
                transform: rotate(-45deg);
                transition: transform 0.3s ease;
            }
            #view.active .arrow {
                margin-top: 5px;
                transform: rotate(135deg);
            }
        </style>
        <div id="product-info" style="margin: ${this.marginTop}px 0 ${this.marginBottom}px 0;">
            <div id="product-content">
                
                
                  <p>10.08 x 7.68 x 9.96 in | 41.22 lbs</p><ul><li>60% More: Upgraded to stronger 2048Wh energy, get an <strong>extra 768Wh energy</strong> for your devices.</li><li><strong>1920W Continuous Output: </strong>50% higher capacity for running high-power loads. Enable AC/refrige to run simultaneously.</li><li>Smart BMS Protection: Equipped with 10+ safety protections , use every kWh with peace of mind.</li><li>10+ Years of Robust Performance:<strong> 6000+ cycles @80% DOD</strong>, with slow capacity fade and exceptional stability—no maintenance or replacement needed.</li><li>Easy Installation:<strong> 66% lighter & 50% smaller</strong> than 2* 12V 100Ah lead-acid, saving more space for you.</li><li>Perfect Lead-acid Replacement: Seamless integration with Suitable for RVs, energy storage, solar energy & ships. (LFP charger required).</li><li>Max. 4S4P:<strong> Max. 32.76kWh and 30.72kW</strong> continuous output Power</li><li>Works in extreme temperature Environments(-4℉~140℉): plus IP65 waterproof </li></ul>
                
            </div>
            <div id="view">
                <span id="toggle-text">${this.viewMoreText}</span>
                <span class="arrow"></span>
            </div>
        </div>
        `;
        this.viewMoreText = this.viewMoreText;
        this.viewLessText = this.viewLessText;
    }
    connectedCallback() {
        const productContent = this.shadowRoot.getElementById('product-content');
        const viewBtn = this.shadowRoot.getElementById('view');
        const toggleText = this.shadowRoot.getElementById('toggle-text');
        // 检查内容高度是否小于最小高度
        const minHeight = this.defaultCollapsibleHeight; // 与 CSS 中的 max-height 保持一致
        if (productContent.scrollHeight <= minHeight) {
            // 如果内容不足以触发折叠，就隐藏展开按钮
            viewBtn.style.display = 'none';
            productContent.classList.add('less-limit-height')
            
            return; // 不需要绑定事件
        }
        viewBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const expanded = productContent.classList.toggle('expanded');
            viewBtn.classList.toggle('active', expanded);
            toggleText.textContent = expanded ? this.viewLessText : this.viewMoreText;
        });
    }

}

if (!customElements.get('watt-product-page-collapsible-msg')) {
  customElements.define('watt-product-page-collapsible-msg', WattProductPageCollapsibleMsg);
}
</script>

<link href="//www.humsienk.com/cdn/shop/t/11/assets/section.css?v=19467530681101428381741326359" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" media="all">
<link href="//www.humsienk.com/cdn/shop/t/11/assets/accordion.css?v=141887470995092495011741326357" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" media="all">
<div class="t4s-section-inner t4s_nt_se_template--26306759819582__accordion_KBib4U t4s_se_template--26306759819582__accordion_KBib4U t4s-container-wrap  " style="--bg-color: ;--bg-gradient: ;--border-cl: ;--mg-top: ;--mg-right: auto;--mg-bottom: 50px;--mg-left:auto;--pd-top: ;--pd-right: ;--pd-bottom: ;--pd-left: ;--mgtb-top: ;--mgtb-right: auto;--mgtb-bottom: 50px;--mgtb-left: auto;--pdtb-top: ;--pdtb-right: ;--pdtb-bottom: ;--pdtb-left: ;--mgmb-top: ;--mgmb-right: auto;--mgmb-bottom: 30px;--mgmb-left: auto;--pdmb-top: ;--pdmb-right: ;--pdmb-bottom: ;--pdmb-left: ;"><div class="t4s-container"><div class="t4s-accordion-style-1" itemscope="" itemtype="https://schema.org/FAQPage"><link href="//www.humsienk.com/cdn/shop/t/11/assets/top-head.css?v=2445928691609596931741326359" rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" media="all">
	<div timeline="" hdt-reveal="slide-in" class="t4s-top-heading t4s_des_title_1 t4s-text-center hdt-reveal--offscreen" style="--heading-height: px;--tophead_mb: 30px;--tophead_mt: px;" observed=""><div class="heading-testimonials-star ">
				
				<h3 class="t4s-section-title t4s-title"><span>Frequently Asked Questions</span></h3>
			</div></div><div class="t4s-tabs t4s-type-accordion t4s-text-start t4s-tabs-enabled t4s-tabs-accordion-enabled" data-t4s-tabs="" style="--title-cl: #222222;--bg-title-cl: #f6f6f8;--title-active-cl: #f64d09;--bg-title-active-cl: #f6f6f8;--content-cl: #878787;--bg-content-cl: #fff;"><div class="t4s-tab-wrapper " data-t4s-tab-wrapper="" itemscope="" itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Question">
            <a id="b_accor_item_ndUjKb" class="t4s-accor-title" href="#t4s-accor_item_ndUjKb" rel="nofollow" data-t4s-tab-item="" data-no-instant="">
              <span class="t4s-accor-text">
                <span class="t4s-accor-icon"></span>
                <span itemprop="name">What is the weight and size? Will it fit my existing battery tray?</span>
              </span>
              <span class="t4s-accor-item-nav"></span>
            </a>
            <div id="t4s-accor_item_ndUjKb" class="t4s-tab-content t4s-rte" data-t4s-tab-content="" style="display: none;" itemscope="" itemprop="acceptedAnswer" itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer">
              <div itemprop="text">
                <p>The 12V 160Ah LiFePO4 battery has the following actual dimensions and weight:</p><ul><li><strong>Dimensions:</strong> 10.08 x 7.68 x 9.96 inches (256 x 195 x 253 mm)</li><li><strong>Weight:</strong> 41.22 lbs (18.7 kg)</li></ul><p>This is approximately half the weight of a lead-acid battery of similar capacity. Please check your device's battery tray size against these dimensions before ordering, as LiFePO4 casings may differ slightly from standard group sizes like GC2 or Group 31.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div><div class="t4s-tab-wrapper " data-t4s-tab-wrapper="" itemscope="" itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Question">
            <a id="b_accor_item_6gCnXF" class="t4s-accor-title" href="#t4s-accor_item_6gCnXF" rel="nofollow" data-t4s-tab-item="" data-no-instant="">
              <span class="t4s-accor-text">
                <span class="t4s-accor-icon"></span>
                <span itemprop="name">Can I connect multiple 12V 160Ah batteries in series or parallel?</span>
              </span>
              <span class="t4s-accor-item-nav"></span>
            </a>
            <div id="t4s-accor_item_6gCnXF" class="t4s-tab-content t4s-rte" data-t4s-tab-content="" style="display: none;" itemscope="" itemprop="acceptedAnswer" itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer">
              <div itemprop="text">
                <p>Yes. You can connect up to 4 batteries in<strong>parallel</strong>(12V, increased capacity to 640Ah) or<strong>series</strong>(24V / 36V / 48V, capacity stays 160Ah). For best performance, use identical batteries from the same brand and fully charge them before connecting. Parallel connections require a proper bus bar or cable sizing.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div><div class="t4s-tab-wrapper " data-t4s-tab-wrapper="" itemscope="" itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Question">
            <a id="b_accor_item_fWiD8t" class="t4s-accor-title" href="#t4s-accor_item_fWiD8t" rel="nofollow" data-t4s-tab-item="" data-no-instant="">
              <span class="t4s-accor-text">
                <span class="t4s-accor-icon"></span>
                <span itemprop="name">Does this battery have a built-in Battery Management System (BMS)?</span>
              </span>
              <span class="t4s-accor-item-nav"></span>
            </a>
            <div id="t4s-accor_item_fWiD8t" class="t4s-tab-content t4s-rte" data-t4s-tab-content="" style="display: none;" itemscope="" itemprop="acceptedAnswer" itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer">
              <div itemprop="text">
                <p>Yes. The 12V 160Ah LiFePO4 battery includes a smart <strong>150A BMS</strong>. It provides overcharge, over-discharge, overcurrent, short circuit, and temperature protection. The BMS also supports cell balancing for longer cycle life (typically 5,000–8,000 cycles).</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div><div class="t4s-tab-wrapper " data-t4s-tab-wrapper="" itemscope="" itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Question">
            <a id="b_accor_item_VtcfbJ" class="t4s-accor-title" href="#t4s-accor_item_VtcfbJ" rel="nofollow" data-t4s-tab-item="" data-no-instant="">
              <span class="t4s-accor-text">
                <span class="t4s-accor-icon"></span>
                <span itemprop="name">Do I need a special charger for this LiFePO4 battery?</span>
              </span>
              <span class="t4s-accor-item-nav"></span>
            </a>
            <div id="t4s-accor_item_VtcfbJ" class="t4s-tab-content t4s-rte" data-t4s-tab-content="" style="display: none;" itemscope="" itemprop="acceptedAnswer" itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer">
              <div itemprop="text">
                <p>Yes, we recommend using a <a href="/products/12v-20ah-lifepo4-battery-charger" target="_blank" title="Humsienk 12V 20A LiFePO4 Battery Charger" rel="noopener" aria-describedby="a11y-new-window-message"><strong>LiFePO4-specific charger</strong></a><strong> </strong>with a voltage of 14.2V–14.6V. A standard lead-acid charger (especially those with a desulfation or equalization mode) may damage the battery. Most quality solar charge controllers (MPPT/PWM) and alternator DC-DC chargers work fine if set to the LiFePO4 profile.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div><div class="t4s-tab-wrapper " data-t4s-tab-wrapper="" itemscope="" itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Question">
            <a id="b_accor_item_C8pKCG" class="t4s-accor-title" href="#t4s-accor_item_C8pKCG" rel="nofollow" data-t4s-tab-item="" data-no-instant="">
              <span class="t4s-accor-text">
                <span class="t4s-accor-icon"></span>
                <span itemprop="name">What devices can this 12V 160Ah LiFePO4 battery run?</span>
              </span>
              <span class="t4s-accor-item-nav"></span>
            </a>
            <div id="t4s-accor_item_C8pKCG" class="t4s-tab-content t4s-rte" data-t4s-tab-content="" style="display: none;" itemscope="" itemprop="acceptedAnswer" itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer">
              <div itemprop="text">
                <p>This battery is ideal for RVs, trolling motors, fish finders, camping, off-grid solar systems, backup power, and 12V appliances. For example, it can power a 40W fridge for about 40–48 hours or a 100W TV for about 18–20 hours (actual runtime depends on load and efficiency).</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div></div>
    </div></div></div>
</section><section id="shopify-section-template--26306759819582__slideshow_TRiYDn" class="shopify-section t4s-section t4s-section-all t4s_bk_flickity t4s_tp_cd t4s-sec-slideshow"><!-- sections/slideshow.liquid -->
